mapper.select: SELECT sr.*, v.vol_name, a.act_title FROM SERVICERECORD sr LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON sr.vol_id = v.vol_id LEFT JOIN ACTIVITY a ON sr.act_id = a.act_id WHERE sr.record_id = #{recordId}

SELECT sr.*, v.vol_name, a.act_title FROM SERVICERECORD sr LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON sr.vol_id = v.vol_id LEFT JOIN ACTIVITY a ON sr.act_id = a.act_id WHERE sr.vol_id = #{volId} ORDER BY sr.service_date DESC

SELECT sr.*, v.vol_name, a.act_title FROM SERVICERECORD sr LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON sr.vol_id = v.vol_id LEFT JOIN ACTIVITY a ON sr.act_id = a.act_id WHERE sr.act_id = #{actId} ORDER BY sr.service_date
SELECT sr.*, v.vol_name, a.act_title FROM SERVICERECORD sr LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON sr.vol_id = v.vol_id LEFT JOIN ACTIVITY a ON sr.act_id = a.act_id ORDER BY sr.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SERVICERECORD(vol_id, act_id, attend_id, service_date, service_hours, service_content, service_evaluation) VALUES(#{volId}, #{actId}, #{attendId}, #{serviceDate}, #{serviceHours}, #{serviceContent}, #{serviceEvaluation})
mapper.update: UPDATE SERVICERECORD SET service_content = #{serviceContent}, service_evaluation = #{serviceEvaluation}, service_status = #{serviceStatus} WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SERVICERECORD WHERE vol_id = #{volId} AND service_status = 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(service_hours), 0) FROM SERVICERECORD WHERE vol_id = #{volId} AND service_status = 1
